name: love-space
description: Love Space - 情侣专属私密网站系统

scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=love-space
scripts.init-db: cd worker && npx wrangler d1 execute love-space-db --file=./schema.sql --remote
scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
